name: Bethel Park
description: Bethel Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morganton, NC. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Carbon City Park
description: Carbon City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morganton, NC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
address: Carbon City Park 800 Carbon City Road Morganton

name: Collett Street Recreation Center
description: Collett Street Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morganton, NC. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Powerhouse Pickleball
description: Powerhouse Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Morganton, NC. There are 7 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.
hours: 9:00am-10pm Hours of Availability Mon - Fri 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM Saturday 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM Sunday 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM © Powerhouse Pickleball At Lake James . All Rights Reserved. Designed and hosted by Overmountain Studios, Inc .

name: Valdese Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Valdese Community Center in Valdese, NC! There are 3 hard courts. 2 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
